title: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026 Out

detail.title: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026 released for the Polytechnic Lateral Entry exam. Download your DECE LE 2026 online admit card at bceceboard.bihar.gov.in using registration number and password, and check exam date 24 May 2026, exam city, centre and instructions here.

sections.heading: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026 Out

content.text: Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) has released the DECE LE Admit Card 2026 for Diploma Entrance Competitive Examination (Lateral Entry) on its official website. The admit card is available only in online mode for all candidates who successfully filled the DECE LE 2026 application form.

As per recent notifications and updates, Bihar DECE LE 2026 exam will be conducted on 24 May 2026 for lateral entry admission to 2nd year of Diploma/Polytechnic courses in various government and private institutions of Bihar. The DECE LE 2026 hall ticket download link has been activated in the Online Portal.
Click Here: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026

links.text: Bihar Diploma DECE LE Admit Card 2026

sections.heading: Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026 – Overview
How to Download Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026

content.text: To download the DECE LE 2026 hall ticket, follow these steps:

items: Visit the official BCECEB website: https://bceceboard.bihar.gov.in.
On the homepage, look for the “Online Portal” section and click on “Download Admit Card of DECE[LE]‑2026”.
You will be redirected to the DECE LE 2026 online exam portal on admissions.nic.in/bihar.
Under Registered Candidate Sign In, enter your Registration Number/Application Number, Password or Date of Birth, and the Security Pin/Captcha shown on the screen.
Click on “Sign In / Submit” to log in. Your Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen.
Check all details (name, exam date, time, exam centre) carefully and then download and print 2–3 clear A4‑size copies of the admit card.

content.text: If you have forgotten your registration number or password, use the “Forgot Registration No./Password” option on the portal (if available) or refer to your email/SMS, and contact BCECEB helpdesk if needed.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026

content.text: The DECE LE hall ticket 2026 contains vital information, which candidates must verify:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Father’s name and basic personal details
Registration number / roll number
Exam name: Diploma Entrance Competitive Examination (Lateral Entry) – DECE LE 2026
Exam date: 24 May 2026, exam time and reporting time (as specified)
Exam centre name, centre code and full address
Category and other eligibility details (if printed)
Important instructions and exam‑day guidelines

content.text: In case of any discrepancy (name, photograph, exam date, centre details), candidates should immediately contact BCECEB through the helpdesk before the exam day.

sections.heading: Documents Required with Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the DECE LE 2026 exam day, candidates must carry:

items: A printed copy of the Bihar DECE LE Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout, colour or good‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID proof, such as: Aadhaar Card PAN Card Passport Driving Licence Voter ID Any other government‑issued ID accepted as per BCECEB instructions.
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Passport
Driving Licence
Voter ID
Any other government‑issued ID accepted as per BCECEB instructions.
Additional documents, if specified (for example, PwD certificate and scribe permission letter for candidates availing such facilities).

content.text: Entry to the exam centre will not be permitted without the printed DECE LE hall ticket and valid photo ID.
